name: Fresh Herb Buttermilk Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Elizabeth Powell
Preparation Time: 0:40
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Cut the butter into tablespoon pieces and blend it with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles cornmeal.
3. Stir the fresh herbs, half a cup of buttermilk, and beaten egg together in a separate bowl.
4. Add this mixture to the flour mixture and continue adding buttermilk as needed until a dough forms.
5. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead once.
6. Let the dough rest for about one minute.
7. Roll the dough out to 3/4 inch thickness.
8. Cut into 2-inch rounds.
9. Place the biscuits on a buttered baking sheet, spacing them about 1 inch apart.
10. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
